title: Log in and access the dashboard
description: Verifies a user can log in from the login page and land on the dashboard with an authenticated session.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email/username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Schedule a post and verify it appears in tasks
description: Verifies a user can compose a post, select platforms, add media, schedule it, and then see the scheduled job listed on the tasks page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email/username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard
Start a new post composition
Fill a caption into the post composer
Select at least one target platform
Add media to the post using the in-app media picker
Set a valid future schedule time
Confirm scheduling
Click to open the tasks page
Verify the newly scheduled post is listed in tasks
Verify the scheduled item shows a scheduled time

title: Generate a caption in chat and apply it in the dashboard composer
description: Verifies a user can get caption ideas from the AI chat and apply a suggestion into a new post composition on the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email/username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /chat
Start a new conversation with the AI assistant
Fill a prompt requesting caption ideas into the chat input
Send the chat message
Wait for the AI reply to appear
Apply one suggested caption to the composer
Navigate to /dashboard
Verify the post composer contains the applied caption

title: Inspect task logs and mark task reviewed
description: Verifies a user can open a task, view its logs, and mark it as reviewed with the reviewed state reflected in the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to tasks
Open a task from the task list to inspect details
Scroll through the task details area to the logs section
Mark the task as reviewed
Verify the task is shown as reviewed

title: Stop a running task with confirmation
description: Verifies a user can stop a running task after confirming, and the task no longer appears as active.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to tasks
Select a task that is currently shown as running
Initiate stopping the task
Confirm stopping the task in the in-app confirmation prompt
Verify the task is no longer listed as active

title: Reply to a message thread from notifications
description: Verifies a user can open an unread thread, send a reply, and see the reply appear in the thread.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to notifications
Open a message thread from the unread list
Fill a reply message into the reply composer
Send the reply
Verify the sent reply appears in the thread

title: Mark a notification thread as read and reduce unread count
description: Verifies a user can mark an unread thread as read and the unread count decreases accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to notifications
Note the current unread count indicator
Mark one unread thread as read
Verify the unread count indicator decreases

title: Update and save a user preference
description: Verifies the user can change a preference on the settings page and successfully save it with a visible confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to open settings
Change a user preference setting to a different value
Save changes
Verify a save confirmation is visible
Verify the updated preference value is shown in settings

title: Start an agent from its details view
description: Verifies a user can open an agent’s details and start it, resulting in a visible running status.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to agents
Open the details view for an agent from the list
Start the agent
Verify the agent status is shown as running

title: Change scheduling timezone and see it reflected for scheduled items
description: Verifies changing the scheduling timezone updates how scheduled task times are displayed on the tasks page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to open settings
Select a different scheduling timezone
Save changes
Click the navigation link to open the dashboard
Create a new scheduled post with a valid future schedule time
Click the navigation link to open tasks
Verify the newly created scheduled task is listed
Verify the scheduled time is displayed using the selected timezone

title: Stop an agent from its details view
description: Verifies a user can stop a running agent from its details view and see the status change to stopped.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to agents
Open the details view for an agent from the list
Start the agent
Stop the agent
Verify the agent status is shown as stopped

title: Persist saved settings across app refresh
description: Verifies that once a setting is saved it remains applied after a page refresh and reopening settings.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to open settings
Change a user preference setting to a different value
Save changes
Press F5 to refresh the page
Verify the user remains signed in and stays on a protected page
Verify the updated preference value is still shown in settings

title: Agent state persists after refresh
description: Verifies an agent’s stopped state persists after refreshing the page so users can trust the control state.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to agents
Open the details view for an agent from the list
Stop the agent
Press the browser refresh key
Verify the agent status is shown as stopped

title: Keep unsaved changes from being silently applied when leaving settings
description: Verifies that changing a preference without saving does not persist after navigating away and returning to settings.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to open settings
Change a user preference setting to a different value
Click the navigation link to open the dashboard
Click the navigation link to open settings
Verify the preference value is unchanged from the last saved state

title: Prevent scheduling without selecting a platform
description: Verifies the composer requires at least one platform selection before a post can be scheduled.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email/username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /dashboard
Start a new post composition
Fill a caption into the post composer
Set a valid future schedule time
Attempt to confirm scheduling
Verify a validation prompt to select at least one platform is visible
Verify no scheduled post is created

title: Tasks page supports empty state
description: Verifies the tasks page shows a clear empty state when there are no tasks.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to tasks
Verify either a task list is displayed or an empty state message is visible

title: Prevent saving when required timezone selection is cleared
description: Verifies the settings page blocks saving and shows validation feedback when the user removes a required timezone selection.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to open settings
Clear the scheduling timezone selection
Save changes
Verify a timezone validation error is visible
Verify the settings are not saved

title: Reject login with incorrect credentials
description: Verifies the login form blocks access when incorrect credentials are submitted and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email/username field with invalid-user@example.com
Fill in the password field with wrong-password
Submit the login form
Verify a login validation error is visible
Verify the user remains on the login page

title: Agents page supports empty state
description: Verifies the agents page shows a clear empty state when no agents exist.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to agents
Verify either an agent list is displayed or an empty state message is visible

title: Show a clear empty state for optional preferences when none are configured
description: Verifies the settings page displays an appropriate empty/default state for optional preferences that have not been set yet.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to open settings
Verify default values or an empty state are shown for optional preferences
Verify the page provides a clear path to configure preferences

title: Notifications page supports empty state
description: Verifies the notifications page shows a clear empty state when there are no notifications or message threads.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to notifications
Verify either a notifications list is displayed or an empty state message is visible
